targets.expr:
# Error percentage per system
(
  sum by(system) (rate(gemini_cql_error_requests{cluster=~"$cluster"}[$interval]))
  / 
  sum by(system) (rate(gemini_cql_requests{cluster=~"$cluster"}[$interval]))
) * 100

targets.legendFormat: bytes of memory are used for other runtime allocations

panels.description: shows how many heap objects are allocated. This is a counter value so you can use rate() to objects allocated/s.
panels.title: Rate of Objects Allocated

panels.description: go_memstats_lookups_total – counts how many pointer dereferences happened. This is a counter value so you can use rate() to lookups/s.
panels.title: Rate of a Pointer Dereferences

list.description: Test or Cluster - To which cluster the executed statement belongs to
list.label: Statement Logger Storage
list.name: stmt_storage
